steps.title: Add another method
steps.content: The first sentence describes Reed using blue threads and muscovite to prevent counterfeiting. The second sentence introduces a separate anti-counterfeiting technique: stamping notes with detailed sage leaf imprints.

steps.title: Reject nonadditive signals
steps.content: A and C would make the sage-leaf stamps a specification or example of the thread-and-muscovite method, but they are a separate method. B signals contrast, though the ideas work together. The answer is D.
